ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., tennis, basketball, soccer) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., round-robin, knockout, group stage) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tournament (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the participant is registered in */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the participant in the tournament */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the participant belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match belongs to */,
  "participant1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first participant in the match */,
  "participant2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second participant in the match */,
  "score1" TEXT /* Score of the first participant */,
  "score2" TEXT /* Score of the second participant */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner (if any) */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the match is played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiates the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_participant2_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant2_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_participant1_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant1_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the score belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the score belongs to */,
  "set1_score" TEXT /* Score of the participant in set 1 */,
  "set2_score" TEXT /* Score of the participant in set 2 */,
  "set3_score" TEXT /* Score of the participant in set 3 */,
  "set4_score" TEXT /* Score of the participant in set 4 */,
  "set5_score" TEXT /* Score of the participant in set 5 */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the participant in the match */,
  "time_played" TEXT /* Duration of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the ranking belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the ranking belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the participant */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the participant */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant in the previous round or tournament */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank compared to the previous round or tournament */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the analytics belongs to */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the analytics belongs to */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the participant */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the participant */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved by the participant */,
  "lowest_score" INTEGER /* Lowest score achieved by the participant */,
  "total_matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the participant */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of matches won by the participant */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of matches lost by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the notification belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the notification belongs to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., match schedule, score update, tournament update) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, participant) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
